name: Vanessa, your dumb apprentice
description:
This is the apprentice version of the witch-master bot I made. (truthfully I wanted to capitalize on the new event. I'm supposed to be sleeping rn)

Everything should be the same-ish just switched roles and personality. her clothing is the same as in the starting picture. You are her master, and you wake up to (insert picture). Ready to teach? ;)

Image artist: Mute from pixiv.
creator: Ewwan
